meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve can't deploy apps (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't deploy apps. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Project Template: Deploy Apps Like a Pro (2024)
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with deployment. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to launch your first SaaS app with professional-grade infrastructure.
content.answer_block: Deployment failure is usually a configuration mismatch. The Antigravity project template standardizes your environment, automating CI/CD pipelines and infrastructure-as-code. By pairing it with Claude Code, you eliminate manual terminal errors and environment drift, ensuring your application moves from your local machine to a production-ready cloud environment in minutes.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks perfecting your logic, only to watch your terminal vomit a wall of red error text the moment you attempt to deploy. That 'deployment wall' is the graveyard of junior developer ambitions; it’s where great ideas go to die in local host limbo. You aren't failing because you can't code—you're failing because you're fighting the infrastructure instead of building your product.

Today, we break that cycle. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, we turn deployment from a high-stakes guessing game into a predictable, automated process. We will combine this with the raw power of Claude Code to scaffold, configure, and ship your application, giving you the professional confidence to move from student to SaaS engineer.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish a production-hardened directory structure that separates concerns and prepares your app for containerization.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity template with support for Node.js, Docker, and GitHub Actions CI/CD pipelines.

steps.title: Configure Environment Parity
steps.description: Ensure your local environment matches production to prevent 'it works on my machine' syndrome.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a .env.example file and a corresponding validation script that checks for required production environment variables.

steps.title: Automate Dockerization
steps.description: Create a multi-stage Dockerfile that minimizes image size and secures your application runtime.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a multi-stage Dockerfile optimized for high-performance Node.js apps, including non-root user security best practices.

steps.title: Establish Deployment Pipelines
steps.description: Define the GitHub Actions workflow to automate testing and deployment upon every push to the main branch.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs unit tests, builds the Docker image, and pushes it to a container registry.

steps.title: Final Health Check and Launch
steps.description: Run a final audit to ensure your deployment path is free of bottlenecks and security vulnerabilities.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a deployment readiness audit on the current project structure and suggest final optimizations for production.

pro_tips: Always pin your base image versions in Dockerfiles to prevent breaking changes from upstream updates.
Use a 'staging' branch for integration testing before merging into main to catch deployment bugs early.
Leverage Claude Code to write your infrastructure unit tests; treat your pipeline code with the same rigor as your app code.
Implement log aggregation early; debugging a deployed app without centralized logs is a nightmare.
Keep your secrets out of version control by using environment variable injection during the build process.
content.next_steps: Once deployed, focus on setting up monitoring and observability tools like Sentry or Datadog to track your application performance in real-time.
content.conversion_block: You are no longer just a student writing code; you are an engineer shipping production software. Take this momentum, refine your infrastructure, and start scaling your vision. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
